svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 28px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Standard MoE: the hidden cost is materialized routing tensors

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 52px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #667085;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#667085, #868ea0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: The math is simple; the expensive part is carrying gathered/scattered activations through HBM.
